title: Webhook response wrapped in an array
symptom: The response from the webhook is always returned as an array, even when a single object is expected.
applies_when: Expecting a single JSON object response
not_this_if: The output is correctly formatted in other nodes
The workflow is not using the Respond to Webhook node
root_cause: The Respond to Webhook node in n8n is designed to output data in a specific format. By default, it wraps the output in an array, which can be confusing when a single object is intended.
fix_steps: Add a Set node before the Respond to Webhook node
Change the mode of the Set node to 'json'
In the Respond to Webhook node, set 'Respond with' to 'First incoming item'
agent_instruction: Use a Set node to format the output correctly before responding to the webhook.
